About Me

The Person Behind
the Automation

I'm Victor Nwobodo — a workflow automation specialist and AI systems builder with deep hands-on expertise across the tools that power modern business operations.

I don't just configure platforms. I architect intelligent systems that think, connect, and act — eliminating manual bottlenecks and freeing teams to focus on what actually matters.

Beyond building, I teach automation as an instructor across Monday.com, Airtable, n8n, Zapier, and Make — which means every system I deliver comes with clarity, documentation, and a team that understands what runs underneath.

🎓
Automation Instructor Teaching Monday.com, Airtable, n8n, Zapier & Make to professionals and businesses
🤖
AI Systems Builder Currently building Gemini-powered chatbots and intelligent email auto-responders
🔗
Integration Architect Connecting CRMs, Google Sheets, APIs, and SaaS tools into seamless data pipelines
📋
Process Strategist Mapping As-Is processes and engineering To-Be workflows that actually scale
